info.description: Complete, audited collection. Roles: doctor|patient. All responses: {success, data} or {success, message}.
info.name: Therapy Booking - Full API (Audited)

request.description: Register a doctor. userType must be 'doctor'. Returns {success:true, data:{id,name,email,role,token,refreshToken}}
Register a patient. userType must be 'patient'.
Login. Returns {success:true, data:{id,name,email,role,token,refreshToken}}
Returns {success:true, data:{id,email,role,fullName,isEmailVerified}}
Role: doctor. consultationDuration: 30min|45min|60min (NOT 50min). Returns {success:true, data:{doctorId, profileStatus, profile:{fullName,primarySpecialty,...}}}
Role: doctor. Optional ?status=scheduled|completed|cancelled
Role: patient. Uses fullName. Returns {success:true, data:{patientId, profileStatus, profile:{fullName,gender,phoneNumber,age}}}
Role: patient. Optional ?status=scheduled|completed|cancelled
Role: patient. scheduledTime must be whole hour (HH:00). consultationType: video|audio|chat. Returns {success:true, data:{id,status,scheduledDate,scheduledTime,endTime,consultationType}}
Role: doctor or patient. Returns appointments based on role.
Role: patient. Only 'scheduled' appointments can be cancelled.
Role: doctor required to change status.
Role: doctor. Appointment must be 'scheduled'.
Role: doctor. Appointment must be 'in_progress'.
next_follow_up_date is the correct field (not follow_up_date).
Role: doctor or patient. messageType: text only (MVP).

body.raw: {"recipient_id":"{{doctorId}}","message_body":"Hi, I would like to ask about my prescription.","subject":"Prescription Query"}

request.description: Standalone message. Fields: recipient_id (required), message_body or content, subject (optional).
Expects 400: userType must be one of patient or doctor
Expects 400: password min 6 chars
Expects 401: Invalid credentials
Expects 400: Only whole-hour slots allowed
Expects 400: consultationDuration must be 30min|45min|60min
Expects 401: Unauthorized
